name: theme-gray
visual_summary: theme-gray is a simple, versatile theme designed to provide a neutral background for applications. It features a palette of gray tones and can be used for creating a wide range of UI elements. This theme is ideal for applications that require a clean and minimalistic design.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready theme component with the following characteristics:

Name: theme-gray
Description: theme-gray is a simple, versatile theme designed to provide a neutral background for applications. It features a palette of gray tones and can be used for creating a wide range of UI elements. This theme is ideal for applications that require a clean and minimalistic design.
Style: minimal
Interactions: 
Tags: ui, theme, gray, neutral

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
